subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! Give thanks that in this divine springtime ye dwell in the Paradise of divine knowledge, beneath the shade of the Tree of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی شکر کنید که در این بهار الهی در جنت فردوس عرفان در ظل سدره رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @nearness and remoteness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude
